label: Shader Type
description: Defines a named shader used when rendering things, pawns, flecks, and other graphics on the map and in UI contexts.

shaderPath.label: Shader path
shaderPath.description: Path to the Unity shader asset inside the RimWorld asset bundle, relative to the Shaders/ directory and without file extension. Used at runtime by ShaderDatabase.LoadShader.

uiShaderPath.label: UI shader path
uiShaderPath.description: Optional shader variant used when drawing this graphic in UI contexts such as the inventory or trade screen. Falls back to shaderPath when absent.
